## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss community growth metrics, roles, and strategies for GrowthX's content and social media efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Community growth target: 1,000 members by December, mid-high thousands by next year](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Focus on improving content quality, especially for courses (aiming for 8-9/10 quality)](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Shift in social media strategy: prioritize personal accounts over company accounts](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [Rafid needs to demonstrate ownership and quality improvement to secure a full-time role](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)

## Topics

### Community Growth and Metrics

  - [Current community revenue: \~$2,000 with 30-40 paying members](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Year-end goal: 1,000 members](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Long-term vision: mid to high thousands of members by next year](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [New metrics tracking spreadsheet introduced, focusing on weekly growth across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Content Strategy and Quality

  - [Will to lead content direction, Brandon to assist with course segmentation](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Courses need significant quality improvement (current 3/10, aiming for 8-9/10)](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Exploring partnerships with subject matter experts (e.g., McKinsey insights, LLM YouTuber)](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Repository of reusable content assets being developed in Frame](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)

### Social Media Strategy

  - [Shift focus from company accounts to personal accounts (Jason, Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [LinkedIn: Long-form text posts from Jason's account, video content from personal accounts](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [X (Twitter): Experiment with short, value-driven posts; avoid "cringy" content](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [YouTube: Emphasize hook, titles, and vertical format for shorts](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

### Team Roles and Responsibilities

  - [Jason: Overseeing overall strategy, focusing on demand gen and product positioning](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Will: Leading content direction and community growth](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Rafid: Managing social media strategy and community engagement](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Seeking a senior community lead with experience from successful communities](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

### Events and Community Engagement

  - [Recent Mixer event was successful with high-quality attendees and professional organization](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Plans to integrate event information into the community platform](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rafid to refine metrics spreadsheet layout for week-over-week comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Jason to add Rafid as admin to the Luma calendar for better event visibility](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Develop strategy for company social media accounts, focusing on unique value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [Continue improving content quality across all platforms](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Rafid to demonstrate ownership and quality improvements in his areas of responsibility](https://fathom.video/share/UKbKicJSqHNLzQPJTjv8pHXW6KgLzJWd?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)
